headline: 2-Year Yield Surges to 2006 Highs Amid Oil Spike

article.title: Treasury Two-Year Yield Rises to Highest Since 2025 on Oil Gain
article.summary: The Treasury two-year yield climbed to its highest level in more than 16 months as renewed tensions in Iran pushed up oil prices, fanning speculation that the Federal Reserve will tighten policy to keep inflationary pressure in check.

headline: Oil Spikes 5% on US Iran Airstrikes

article.title: US Says It Conducted Fresh Round of Strikes Against Iran
article.summary: The US releases videos from unidentified locations, saying its forces completed a third round of strikes against Iran. It prompted retaliatory strikes from Tehran. (Source: Bloomberg)

headline: Circle Gains OCC Nod for $1B National Bank

article.title: Circle (CRCL) Wins Final OCC Approval for National Trust Bank
article.summary:

Circle (CRCL) Wins Final OCC Approval for National Trust Bank
Circle won final OCC approval to establish a national trust bank, allowing it to place USDC reserves under federal oversight and expanding its regulated digital asset custody business.
